g.text: final Future<List<GeneratedImage>>value=executorService.submit(new Callable<List<GeneratedImage>>(){public List<GeneratedImage>call()throws Exception{try {final List<GeneratedImage>generatedImages=sourceFileReader.getGeneratedImages();final Set<File>files=FileWithSuffix.convert(sourceFileReader.getIncludedFiles());files.add(f);modifieds.put(f,new FileWatcher(files));return Collections.unmodifiableList(generatedImages);}catch (Exceptione){Logme.error(e);return Collections.emptyList();}}});
